nasb.text: therefore, behold, I am going to deprive the flank of Moab of its cities, of its cities which are on its frontiers, the glory of the land, Beth-jeshimoth, Baal-meon and Kiriathaim,

esv.text: therefore I will lay open the flank of Moab from the cities, from its cities on its frontier, the glory of the country, Beth-jeshimoth, Baal-meon, and Kiriathaim.

cnv.text: 所以我必除去摩押一面的防守，從邊界的城市開始，就是他們看為那地之榮美的伯．耶西末、巴力．免和基列亭。

ccb.text: 所以我要攻陷摩押边界的城邑，就是那地方引以为荣的伯·耶西末、巴力·免和基列亭。
